headline: Cintas Expands Liquidity With New US$2b Facility And Growth Options
summary: Cintas secured a new $2b revolving credit facility. The facility is intended to support liquidity and future growth initiatives. Cintas (NasdaqGS:CTAS), trading at $174.34, has added fresh financial flexibility with a $2b revolving credit facility. The stock is up 5.2% over the past week but has seen a 14.4% decline over the past 30 days and a 7.6% decline over the past year, while longer periods such as 3 years and 5 years show strong cumulative returns of 58.5% and 107.2%...
